headline: Trump 🍊💥 Iran Deal Ends US Power Flex 😂🌍
text:
Bowen 📰😩 SPILLS: Trump 🍊👑 ends his WORST foreign flop 💥🤡 – Iran deal re-opens Strait of Hormuz 🚢🌊 but leaves thousands DEAD 💀😭! US dominance? CRACKED like old iPhone screen 📱💔 – China 🇨🇳👀 watched America BURN through missiles like hot Cheetos 🔥🍟!

Gulf Arab monarchies 👑🏜️ now GHOSTING US like ex on read 📵💔, whispering about new BFFs with Iran 🇮🇷🤝 and diversifying their drip drip drip 💧🛢️! Fertilisers? BLOCKED like bad WiFi 📶🚫 – Africa south of Sahara facing HUNGER GAMES 🍽️😩 later this year!

War started 28 Feb when Israel 🇮🇱⚔️ and US 🇺🇸🔥 misread Tehran like bad GPS 📍🤦 – Khamenei 💀👴 and squad YEETED, school in Minab flattened 🏫💥 killing 150+ civilians including 120 school GIRLS under 12 😢💔! Trump 🍊 and Bibi Netanyahu 🕍👴 promised quick WIN like Marvel ending 🎥🏆 – instead regime got BUFFED 💪🔥 and Mojtaba son took the throne 👑😈!

IRGC new gen commanders 🚀🪖 less chill, more risk – closed Strait like club bouncer 🚧💦, slapped Arab neighbours 🤕 and US bases like Fortnite dance 💃🎮! Hegseth 🪖📢 flex was CAP – American power not CRIPPLED but exposed like bad OnlyFans leak 📉😳!

Israel EXCLUDED from MOU like last picked for dodgeball 🏐😭 – Netanyahu under fire from haters 🔥🤬, election looming before Oct like doomsday clock ⏰💥! Hardliners want Lebanon land grab 🗺️🪖, annexation vibes – but Trump 🍊 venting frustration like toxic tweet storm 🐦😡!

Beirut strike tried to DERAIL talks 🚂💥 but sped them up instead – MOU reopens Strait, lifts Navy blockade 🚢✅, defers nuke drama to future negotiations 🧪🔄! No grand bargain yet – ideology and zero trust = distant pipe dream 💭🚫!

Iranian people still under ruthless regime after promised FREEDOM vision 👁️‍🗨️😭 – America keeps economic MILITARY power 💰⚔️ but impulsive war shows superpower STRUGGLING to stay on top like influencer past prime 📉👑! Sorry affair for all – clock back to 27 Feb when Strait flowed 20% world oil like endless TikTok scroll 🛢️📱!
